title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that denying location tracking during iOS onboarding shows correct permission popups and navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu after cancellation.
steps: Log in or continue as guest
expected: After step 5, a location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow" (Android shows "Only This Time" instead of "Allow Once") and text about location usage. After step 10, a permission popup appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now". After step 11, the app navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu.
